project_context.vibe: Objective, Precise, Functional, Clinical but Modern

layout_spacing.system: Generous Spacing / Control Room Grid (Mode B)
layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Dense grid for data (Bento style). 3 equal columns for R,G,B values. Full width for charts and formula computation.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-md h-14 font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#E5E7EB] text-[#0A0A0A] rounded-md h-14 font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-colors

cards.base: bg-[#F8F9FA] border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-md p-6 flex flex-col justify-between
cards.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-md p-6

inputs.formula_editor: font-mono text-sm bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#22C55E] p-4 rounded-md border border-[#374151] w-full

charts.bar_chart_style: Flat top bars, no rounded corners. Colors map exactly to data_metrics (Red, Green, Blue).
charts.line_chart_style: Straight lines (no bezier curves) to emphasize precision. Use #002FA7 for the line with solid dot markers for each sample.

camera_upload_zone.style: border-2 border-dashed border-[#E5E7EB] bg-[#F8F9FA] h-64 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md relative overflow-hidden

onboarding_background.description: Scientist conducting a laboratory experiment. Apply a white/gray gradient overlay (bg-white/80) so text remains highly legible.

empty_state_history.description: Colorful chemical solution vials. Use as an opacity-10 background image behind the empty history list to add flavor without distraction.

CaptureUpload.layout: Large central upload/camera zone. Bottom fixed CTA: 'Analyze Image'. Use clear, large typography.
CaptureUpload.visuals: Minimalist UI. Let the camera viewfinder take up 70% of the screen height if active.

Analysis.layout: Top: Image preview with interactive crosshair (for manual tap-to-extract region). Middle: Bento grid of 3 cards for R, G, B values. Bottom: Formula editor component and a prominent card showing the computed Absorbance value.
Analysis.interactions: Tapping the image instantly updates the RGB bento boxes. Formula must be editable.

HistoryDashboard.layout: Top half: Line chart (Absorbance over time/samples). Bottom half: Scrollable list of past samples. Each list item should show a tiny color swatch of the extracted RGB.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over gray surfaces has a minimum 4.5:1 ratio (WCAG AA). Do not use light gray text on light gray backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='upload-button', data-testid='formula-input', data-testid='rgb-value-red'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native app. Map the provided Tailwind aesthetic guidelines (colors, fonts, spacing) to StyleSheet objects or NativeWind.
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons (prefer Feather or Ionicons for sharp, unrounded lines).
Do NOT use bubbly/soft UI elements. The user is a chemistry researcher; the UI must look like a high-end lab instrument (Swiss style).
For image pixel extraction in Expo, consider using expo-image-manipulator, a web-view canvas trick, or an external library compatible with Expo to get RGB data from specific X/Y coordinates on tap.
Use AsyncStorage for the local sample history list.
The default computation formula must be clearly editable by the researcher.
